entity.summary: Multi-chain decentralized trading and liquidity platform centered on NEAR, combining AMM and RFQ exchange functions with cross-chain routing, liquidity pools, lending, staking, and bridge access under the RHEA Finance brand.
entity.notes: HEI models RHEA Finance, Rhea DEX, the NEAR exchange surface, and cross-chain DEX routing as one exchange entity. Current first-party materials describe RHEA as the merged evolution of Ref Finance and Burrow Finance; predecessor IDs are not set because those identities are not separately resolved in the current canonical registry.

evidence.title: RHEA Finance official platform
evidence.notes: Current first-party platform identifies RHEA as a multi-chain decentralized trading and lending platform and exposes DEX, cross-chain routing, liquidity, staking, bridge, and application entry points.

evidence.title: Rhea Dex protocol metrics
evidence.notes: Independent protocol metrics report current non-zero NEAR-chain DEX volume, fees, revenue, and TVL for Rhea Dex, corroborating active exchange operation.
